nasb.text: For whoever is joined with all the living, there is hope; surely a live dog is better than a dead lion.

esv.text: But he who is joined with all the living has hope, for a living dog is better than a dead lion.

cnv.text: 凡有生命的，就有盼望，因為活狗比死獅更好。

ccb.text: 有生命就有希望，一条活狗总比一头死狮子强。

csbs.text: 要知道，谁在活人当中，谁就有希望，因为活着的狗好过死了的狮子；
